subTitle: Heading to the far north into the Arctic to learn about the Inuit's traditional culture and way of life, the brothers accompany an elder and young hunter on a 200-mile skidoo hunt across the barren land and frozen sea ice.

subTitle: A hurricane in the south forces Lisa to change direction; meeting southern Van Lifers living under the radar in a state where the lifestyle is judged harshly.
